commonItems: Credits can roll over for up to 30 days, with a cap of 2x monthly quota.

Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled before the next renewal date.

faqItems.a: 2K uses 3 credits per image; 4K uses 9 credits per image.
Yes. Cancellation stops the next renewal and your current paid period remains active.

t2Items: You must have the right to use the photos you upload
Do not upload illegal or infringing content
Privacy.t3Text: You have usage rights for generated photos. We retain rights to the underlying technology and algorithms.

Privacy.refundWindowText: Refund requests must be submitted within 7 days of the original purchase date.
refundEligibleItems: You were charged more than once for the same order.
The transaction was unauthorized (subject to verification).
A technical issue on our side prevented delivery or normal use and could not be resolved in a reasonable time.
refundNonEligibleItems: The service/content has already been delivered, generated, downloaded, or substantially used.
The request is based on a change of mind or personal preference.
The account is restricted due to violations of our Terms of Service.
The request is submitted more than 7 days after purchase.
Privacy.refundRequestText: Email ahai169989@gmail.com and include the following details:
refundRequestItems: A brief description of the issue (screenshots if available)
Privacy.refundProcessingText: Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method through Paddle, usually within 5-10 business days (depending on your bank or payment provider).
Privacy.refundRightsText: Nothing in this policy limits mandatory consumer rights under applicable law.
